title: Digest — Mar 20, 2026, 09:06 AM UTC
summary:
# Devlog for pwarf

## New Features
- Introduced `WRITE_INTERVAL` and `WRITE_TICKS` constants to `shared/src/constants.ts`, enhancing our code's configurability without changing runtime behavior.

## Testing
- All simulation tests have passed successfully, with a perfect score of 17 out of 17.

## Cost
- The cost associated with this change is approximately $3.13 for Claude's processing.

We’re excited about these updates and are looking forward to your feedback!

## Merged PRs
- #304: feat: add WRITE_INTERVAL and WRITE_TICKS constants (closes #195)
